## Description

<!-- What was done and why? Link the related issue if applicable. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — internal improvement, no behavior change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — add or update tests
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, config, dependencies

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat(scope): summary`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles with zero errors (`npm run type-check`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Tests pass and coverage is maintained (`npm test`)
- [ ] All user-facing strings use `useTranslation()` — no hardcoded text
- [ ] All colors and sizes use `useTheme()` — no hardcoded values
- [ ] New components have `testID` and `displayName`
- [ ] Public APIs have JSDoc comments
- [ ] New files follow naming and placement conventions (`docs/engineering-standards.md`)
- [ ] `SETUP.md` or `README.md` updated if behavior or setup changed
